title: Texturepack3000
description: Adds items like Joyride for ryan3000 and world3000's chickens.
body:
## Features

### Joyride flavors
Minecraft foods are retextured to look like flavors of Joyride, as follows:
- Apples -> Blue Raspberry Sour Strips
- Beetroot -> Strawberry Twists
- Golden Apples -> Gummy Busters
- Glow Berries -> Sour Pink Lemonade Strips
- Watermelons -> Watermelon Wedges
- Sweet Berries -> Cherry Berry Ropes

### Other items
- Ender Pearl -> Penny referencing the penny series
- Totem of Undying -> Golden chicken of undying

![All flavors added in this pack alongside a recreation of Ryan's Chicken of the Week podium.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8687597a034e876204b8ddda1e2c092ce72647.png)

## Extra Info:

This pack was created for world3000 (series from ryan3000 AKA. Ryan Trahan), so feel free to use it as a fan of the series.

This essentially an extension of Agrippapas Papa's pack which changed the texture for apples into a Joyride pack.

![Two flavors (Strawberry Twists & Blue Raspberry Sour Strips) Showcased alongside a recreation of Ryan's chicken house.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e61f7d3c4418635e597487005c7dfb2ebad62762_0.webp)
